_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Conduct trial runs of programs and software applications to ensure the desired information is produced and instructions and security levels are correct.
reference_document_element_description: Skill in designing clinical trial databases, including case report form development, edit check logic specification, data validation rules, and the traceability documentation required for regulatory inspection and audit.
comments: DCWF task superset of WIDAI AB domain. AB-S-008 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: RC-A-005 (RC, cosine: 0.510), RC-T-001 (RC, cosine: 0.505).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.2/10 (raw 0.524). Shared vocabulary: [trial]. DCWF-only terms [applications, conduct, correct, desired, ensure, information] vs WIDAI-only terms [audit, case, check, clinical, data, databases] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.848 (P=0.855, R=0.841). Balanced P/R — the 22-word DCWF element and 28-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.5%). "Conduct trial runs of programs and software applications to ensure the desired i" and "Skill in designing clinical trial databases, including case report form developm" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.569 ≈ STS 0.524 (gap 0.045). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [trial] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 6.8%. Shared tokens: [trial]. DCWF-only: [applications, conduct, correct, desired, ensure, information]. WIDAI-only: [audit, case, check, clinical, data, databases].

signals.detail: STS 0.524 barely clears classification threshold for Superset of. This match is fragile and may indicate insufficient KSA coverage for this competency area.
